debug_info.goal:

δ : ℝ

n : ℕ

m : ℕ
hnm : m ≥ n
pos1 : 0 < 1 / (δ / (2 * (b - a)))
NposR : 0 < ↑N
Npos : 0 < N
npos : 0 < n
mpos : 0 < m
⊢ 2 * (b - a) / ↑n < δ

proof_attempts:

                have h₁₀₃ : (1 : ℝ) < (n : ℝ) / (2 * (b - a)) := by

                  have h₁₀₅ : (2 * (b - a) : ℝ) / δ < (n : ℝ) := by linarith

                        <;> linarith

                  linarith
